intel.title: [CISA KEV] WordPress Core - WordPress Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-60137
廠商: WordPress
產品: Core
漏洞名稱: WordPress Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
說明: WordPress Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability when a plugin or theme passes untrusted input to the parameter. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2026-63030 to allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain remote code execution on default WordPress installations.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-08-04
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: WordPress Core 存在 SQL 注入漏洞（CVE-2026-60137），已被 CISA 列入已知被利用漏洞清單。該漏洞可與其他漏洞串聯，允許未授權的攻擊者在預設 WordPress 安裝上執行遠端程式碼（RCE），對公司現有的 WordPress 部落格平台構成嚴重威脅。
analysis.recommendation:
1. 立即將 WordPress 核心系統升級至 7.0.2 或最新安全版本。
2. 檢查並更新所有已安裝的 WordPress 插件與主題，避免未受信任的輸入傳遞至參數。
3. 在未完成升級前，建議於 WAF（如 AWS WAF）部署 SQL 注入防禦規則，並限制管理後台的存取來源 IP。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] WordPress Core - WordPress Core Interpretation Conflict Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-63030
廠商: WordPress
產品: Core
漏洞名稱: WordPress Core Interpretation Conflict Vulnerability
說明: WordPress Core contains an interpretation conflict vulnerability that could allow an attacker to perform SQL Injection and achieve Remote Code Execution. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2026-60137.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-24
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: WordPress Core 存在解析衝突漏洞（CVE-2026-63030），攻擊者可藉此進行 SQL 注入並實現遠端程式碼執行（RCE）。此漏洞已被收錄於 CISA KEV，顯示已有在野活躍攻擊，由於公司內部使用 WordPress 作為部落格平台，面臨極高安全風險。
analysis.recommendation: 1. 立即將所有 WordPress 網站升級至官方釋出的安全版本（WordPress 7.0.2 或最新版本）。2. 限制 WordPress 管理後台（wp-admin）的存取來源 IP，並啟用雙因子認證（2FA）。3. 檢查網站存取日誌，排查是否有異常的 SQL 注入或未授權的程式碼執行跡象。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Langflow Langflow - Langflow Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-0770
廠商: Langflow
產品: Langflow
漏洞名稱: Langflow Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere Vulnerability
說明: Langflow contains an inclusion of functionality from untrusted control sphere vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations. 
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-24
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: CISA 將 Langflow 的安全漏洞 CVE-2026-0770 列入已知遭利用漏洞清單（KEV）。該漏洞源於包含來自不受信任控制領域的功能，允許遠端攻擊者在受影響的系統上執行任意程式碼（RCE）。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] DD-WRT DD-WRT - DD-WRT Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2021-27137
廠商: DD-WRT
產品: DD-WRT
漏洞名稱: DD-WRT Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
說明: DD-WRT contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to overflow an internal buffer used by UPnP and trigger a code execution vulnerability.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-24
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
reference_urls: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, proprietary implementation, or a protocol used by different products. Please check with specific vendors for information on patching status. For more information, please see: https://svn.dd-wrt.com/changeset/45724 ; BOD 26-04: https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/directives/bod-26-04-prioritizing-security-updates-based-risk ; Forensics Triage Requirements: https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/directives/bod-26-04-implementation-guidance-prioritizing-security-updates-based-risk ; https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-27137

analysis.summary: 此漏洞（CVE-2021-27137）存在於 DD-WRT 韌體的 UPnP 元件中，未經身分驗證的攻擊者可利用堆疊緩衝區溢位漏洞執行任意程式碼。該漏洞已被列入 CISA KEV 列表中，顯示已有在野利用之活躍攻擊。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
